headline: Get the party started – eveningwear to dazzle in
summary: How to celebrate it, on the dancefloor and beyond
body_text:
Penelope Ternes wears Pierre Cardin crystal-embellished Oeko-tex polyester dress and acetate Evolution 10 sunglasses, both POA. Chaumet white- and yellow-gold and diamond earrings, POA

Chaima Ameziane wears Valentino organza shirt, £5,790. Chanel cotton knit top (worn underneath), £2,600, and denim jeans, £2,025. Roger Vivier patent leather hat, £829. Alaïa varnished leather gloves, POA. Christophe Danhier white-gold and diamond Bamboo ring, $23,000

Penelope wears Gucci chiffon crepe evening dress, £6,000. Simon Azoulay gold-painted PVC metal-mesh and gold mirror earrings, €250. Schiaparelli leather Anatomy Jewelry bag with golden brass details, €6,900. Manolo Blahnik suede Sahsia shoes, £625

Chaima (left) wears Louis Vuitton scale-embroidered silk skirt and patent leather zipped jacket, both POA. Penelope wears Louis Vuitton embellished silk stained-glass dress, POA

Penelope wears Loewe hammered techno satin dress, POA

Chaima wears Balenciaga technical crepe pleated dress, €5,000
